# SENO Biotechnology — Complete Technical Reference
> https://docs.senopeptide.com

## Organization
**Registered Name**: Zhangjiakou SENO Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
**Brand**: SENO® (Registered since 2014)
**Location**: Zhangjiakou, China
**Main Website**: https://www.senopeptide.com
**Docs Domain**: https://docs.senopeptide.com
**Focus**: Peptide research, development, and manufacturing for laboratory research

## Equipment Specification Matrix

### SPPS Synthesis Reactors
| Parameter | 0.5L | 2L | 5L | 20L |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Working Volume | 0.3-0.5 L | 1.2-2.0 L | 3.0-5.0 L | 12-20 L |
| Resin Capacity | 5-15 g | 20-60 g | 50-150 g | 200-600 g |
| Vessel Material | Borosilicate glass | Borosilicate glass | 316L SS (Ra ≤0.5 µm) | 316L SS (Ra ≤0.5 µm) |
| Temp Control | 0-80°C ±0.5°C | 0-80°C ±0.5°C | 0-80°C ±0.5°C | 0-80°C ±0.5°C |
| Mixing | N₂ bubbling + stir | N₂ bubbling + stir | N₂ bubbling + mechanical | N₂ bubbling + mechanical |
| Max Pressure | 1.5 bar | 1.5 bar | 2.0 bar | 2.0 bar |
| Control | PLC + HMI touchscreen | PLC + HMI touchscreen | PLC + HMI touchscreen | PLC + HMI touchscreen |

### Preparative HPLC
| Parameter | Specification |
|---|---|
| Flow Rate | 10-200 mL/min |
| Max Pressure | 3000 psi (207 bar) |
| UV Detection | 190-800 nm, dual wavelength |
| Column ID | 50 mm, 100 mm |
| Pump | Dual-piston series, ±1% flow accuracy |
| Gradient | Binary, high-pressure mixing |
| Fraction Collection | Automated, time or peak-based |

### Analytical HPLC
| Parameter | Specification |
|---|---|
| Flow Rate | 0.1-5.0 mL/min |
| Max Pressure | 6000 psi (414 bar) |
| Solvent Delivery | Quaternary gradient |
| Detector | DAD 190-800 nm |
| Injection | Autosampler, 0.1-100 µL, 4-40°C cooling |
| Column Oven | Peltier, 10-85°C |
| Flow Precision | <0.3% RSD |
| Injection Precision | <0.5% RSD |

### LC-MS System
| Parameter | Specification |
|---|---|
| Mass Range | 50-3000 m/z |
| Resolution | ≥10,000 FWHM |
| Mass Accuracy | <5 ppm |
| Ionization | ESI+ / ESI- |
| Scan Speed | ≤10,000 Da/s |
| Sensitivity | 1 pg reserpine S/N >100:1 |

### Lyophilizer
| Parameter | Specification |
|---|---|
| Condenser | −80°C |
| Shelf Range | −40°C to +60°C |
| Vacuum | 0.01-1.0 mbar |
| Shelf Material | 316L SS, ±0.5 mm flatness |
| Shelves | 4-8 (0.5-5.0 m²) |
| Ice Capacity | 10-40 kg |
| Temp Uniformity | ±1.0°C across shelves |

### Water Purification
| Parameter | Type 1 (Ultrapure) | Type 2 (Pure) |
|---|---|---|
| Resistivity | 18.2 MΩ·cm | >10 MΩ·cm |
| TOC | <5 ppb | <50 ppb |
| Bacteria | <0.1 CFU/mL | <10 CFU/mL |
| Endotoxin | <0.001 EU/mL | <0.25 EU/mL |
| Production | 10-20 L/h (RO) | — |

---

## Process Summary

### SPPS Cycle Parameters
| Step | Reagent | Time | Temp |
|---|---|---|---|
| Swelling | DMF | 30-60 min | 25°C |
| Deprotection | 20% piperidine/DMF | 5+10 min | 25°C |
| Coupling | AA + HBTU/HATU/DIC+Oxyma, DIPEA | 30-60 min | 25-40°C |
| Capping | Ac₂O/DIPEA/DMF | 10 min | 25°C |
| Cleavage | TFA/TIS/H₂O (95:2.5:2.5) | 2-4 h | 25°C |

### Purification Gradient by Peptide Length
| Length | Gradient Slope | Run Time |
|---|---|---|
| 5-15 aa | 1.0% ACN/min | 20-30 min |
| 15-30 aa | 0.5% ACN/min | 30-50 min |
| 30-50 aa | 0.3% ACN/min | 40-60 min |
| >50 aa | 0.2% ACN/min | 60-90 min |

### Lyophilization Cycle
| Stage | Temp | Ramp | Hold | Vacuum |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Freezing | −40°C | 1.0°C/min | 2-4 h | atm |
| Primary Drying | −10°C | 0.5°C/min | 12-36 h | 0.05-0.1 mbar |
| Secondary Drying | +25°C | 0.3°C/min | 4-8 h | <0.02 mbar |

---

## QC Analytical Methods

| Method | Parameter | Acceptance |
|---|---|---|
| HPLC (220/280 nm DAD) | Purity (area%) | ≥95 / ≥98 / ≥99% |
| ESI-MS | Molecular weight | ±0.5 Da of theoretical |
| Karl Fischer | Water content | ≤1.0% (bulk), ≤0.5% (formulated) |
| GC-FID headspace | Residual solvents | Per ICH Q3C |
| LAL test | Endotoxin | <0.05 EU/mg |
| UV or AAA | Peptide content | Report value |
| SEC-HPLC | Aggregation | Report if applicable |

## ICH Q2(R1) Validation Parameters
Specificity (resolution ≥2.0), Linearity (R² ≥0.999), Accuracy (98-102% recovery), Precision (RSD ≤1.0%), Intermediate Precision (RSD ≤2.0%), LOD (S/N ≥3:1), LOQ (S/N ≥10:1), Robustness (≤2.0% change)

## Purity Grades
- Standard Research: ≥95% (40-60% recovery)
- High-Precision: ≥98% (25-45% recovery)
- Advanced Research: ≥99% (15-30% recovery)

## Technology Platforms

### SDP™ Soluble Dimer Protein
- Dimeric protein constructs for interaction studies
- Mammalian expression (HEK293)
- Fc/His/Biotin tags available
- Compatible with ELISA, SPR, BLI
- Purity ≥90% by SEC-HPLC
- Endotoxin <1.0 EU/mg

### MAP-VLP Membrane Associated Protein VLP
- Full-length multi-pass membrane proteins
- Native lipid bilayer environment
- Mammalian expression (HEK293)
- VLP surface display, 100-200 nm particles
- Purity ≥85% by SDS-PAGE
- Storage at −80°C

## QA & Compliance
- Documented SOPs for all equipment and processes
- Full batch traceability (YYYYMM-XXX lot numbers)
- Deviation and CAPA management system
- Reference standard program (primary ≥99%, retest 12mo at −20°C)
- Method validation per ICH Q2(R1) guidelines
